description: No action needed — customer already had domain pointed at Cloudflare (zone is instantly active on first poll)

expected.subject: priyabakes.com — nothing for you to do
expected.body:
Hi Priya,

Quick heads up — your domain priyabakes.com is already on
Cloudflare, so there are no nameserver changes for you to
make. Nice and easy.

We'll wire it up to your new site on our side and email you
again as soon as it goes live.

— ModuForge
